summary: 合同甲方为上海示例科技有限公司，乙方为杭州数据智能有限公司，合同金额560万元，服务期2026年6月1日至2027年5月31日，逾期交付违约金每日0.05%，付款方式为预付30%验收后70%。

name: growth_review_en.pptx
summary: 2025年活跃用户320万，同比增长42%；付费转化率8.6%，留存率91%。下一步优先降低推理成本、提高复杂表格解析准确率、加强异常恢复。

name: mineru_example.pdf
summary: The paper develops a method to quantify changes in annual flow duration curves (FDCs) following afforestation by removing rainfall variability, using data from 10 catchments in Australia, South Africa, and New Zealand. Two response groups were identified: Group 1 shows increased zero flow days with low flows more affec
